chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 1265 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.10174/2023 (Urgency). 2. For orders on CMA No.10175/2023 (U/O XXXIII R 1 CPC). 20.07.2023 Mr. Irtafa-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the Plaintiff............. 1. Urgency granted. 2. This is the second Application for withdrawal of the lis in July 2023. Counsel submits that he will file a proper application for withdrawal of the suit and requests that this application (CMA No.10175/2023) may be treated as withdrawn. Accordingly, the application stands disposed of as withdrawn. J U D G E
